homepage.heroSubline: Specializing in South Florida's unique pool maintenance needs. From saltwater systems to hurricane prep, we know these waters.
aboutText: Founded in 2012 after Hurricane Wilma revealed gaps in local pool maintenance, Apex Pool Service brings 12 years of Miami-specific expertise. We've serviced everything from Art Deco district plunge pools to Coral Gables estate lagoons.
Our approach combines rigorous chemical testing with an understanding of how Florida's humidity accelerates equipment wear. We use corrosion-resistant parts and hurricane straps as standard practice.
When not maintaining pools, our team volunteers with Miami Waterkeeper to protect Biscayne Bay - because what surrounds your pool matters as much as what's in it.

valueProps.title: Saltwater Specialists
valueProps.description: We balance chemistry for coastal homes where salt air affects pool systems differently than inland properties.

valueProps.title: Hurricane Prep
valueProps.description: Includes storm drain checks and equipment securing - critical for June-November in South Florida.

valueProps.title: Concrete Expertise
valueProps.description: Most Miami pools are gunite. We know how to spot early cracking in our porous limestone substrate.

valueProps.title: Tile Savvy
valueProps.description: From Brickell high-rises to Boca estates, we maintain the glass tile that's prone to etching in our hard water.

homepage.ctaSubline: Schedule your pool assessment today. We serve all Miami-Dade and Broward counties.

services.name: Saltwater Pool Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Specialized care for coastal pools battling salt air corrosion.
services.description:
Miami's oceanfront properties face unique challenges with saltwater pool systems. The same sea breeze that cools your patio accelerates corrosion on heaters and ladder rails. We use titanium heat exchangers and marine-grade stainless steel hardware as standard.

Our monthly service includes testing chlorine generator cells for salt buildup - a common issue when humidity causes rapid evaporation. We also check sacrificial anodes on equipment pads, which degrade faster here than inland. For pools near Biscayne Bay, we recommend quarterly acid washes to prevent scale from our mineral-rich groundwater.
process: Step 1: Test salt levels and chlorine output with digital meter
Step 2: Inspect all metal components for pitting or galvanic corrosion
Step 3: Clean salt cell with diluted muriatic acid solution
Step 4: Apply anti-corrosion lubricant to o-rings and gaskets
benefits: Extends equipment lifespan in corrosive coastal air
Prevents cloudy water from improper chlorine generation
Reduces scaling on glass tile and coping stones
Maintains comfortable swimmer experience year-round

faq.question: How often should salt cells be cleaned in Miami?
faq.answer: Every 2 months minimum - our humidity causes faster calcium buildup than drier climates. Waterfront homes may need monthly cleaning during summer.

faq.question: Do you service commercial saltwater pools?
faq.answer: Yes, we maintain several South Beach hotel pools with systems up to 50,000 gallons. Commercial accounts receive after-hours service to avoid guest disruption.

services.name: Hurricane Preparedness
services.shortDescription: Storm-proof your pool before hurricane season hits.
services.description:
From June through November, Miami pools face wind damage and flooding risks. Our hurricane prep service goes beyond basic covers - we secure equipment pads with aircraft cable and install temporary overflow drains to prevent deck lifting.

For historic homes in Coconut Grove or Coral Gables, we document pool conditions with 360° photos for insurance purposes. Modern construction in Weston or Parkland often requires different approaches - we'll anchor automatic covers with hurricane straps rated for 150mph winds. Post-storm, our team prioritizes safety inspections to check for electrical hazards before restoring filtration.
process: Step 1: Lower water level 12-18" below normal operating level
Step 2: Secure pumps and heaters with galvanized steel straps
Step 3: Install temporary overflow pipes if no built-in drains exist
Step 4: Photograph entire pool area for pre-storm documentation
benefits: Prevents equipment from becoming windborne debris
Reduces risk of deck damage from hydrostatic pressure
Ensures faster post-storm recovery
Meets Miami-Dade County code requirements

faq.question: When should I schedule hurricane prep?
faq.answer: By May 15th to beat the rush. We book completely by early June.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency post-storm service?
faq.answer: Yes, existing clients get priority for safety inspections within 72 hours after evacuation orders lift.

services.name: Gunite Repair
services.shortDescription: Structural repairs for Miami's concrete pools.
services.description:
South Florida's limestone substrate causes unique stress on gunite pools. We specialize in diagnosing cracks before they become major leaks - particularly important for older Coral Gables estates where shifting foundations are common.

Our repair process uses polymer-modified cement that bonds better with existing gunite than standard mixes. For pools near the coast, we add corrosion inhibitors to the mix to combat salt penetration. Most repairs can be completed without draining, using underwater patching techniques perfected on Miami Beach high-rise pools. We color-match new plaster using local sand for seamless blends.
process: Step 1: Pressure test to locate active leaks
Step 2: Chip out damaged areas with pneumatic tools
Step 3: Apply bonding agent and polymer-modified mortar
Step 4: Cure with moisture-retaining blankets for 72 hours
benefits: Prevents water loss in our drought-prone summers
Uses materials formulated for Florida's geology
Saves costly full replastering when caught early
Minimizes disruption to pool use

faq.question: How long do gunite repairs last in Miami?
faq.answer: Our average repair lasts 5-7 years - twice as long as standard methods due to polymer additives that flex with ground movement.

faq.question: Can you repair decorative tile mosaics?
faq.answer: Yes, we've restored historic Mediterranean-style tile work in Miami Shores and Venetian Pool areas since 2015.

services.name: Glass Tile Cleaning
services.description:
Boca Raton's luxury pools deserve spotless glass tile. Our specialized cleaning restores brilliance without damaging delicate surfaces.

Florida's hard water leaves stubborn scale on glass tile, especially in saltwater pools. We use pH-neutral cleaners and nylon brushes to preserve the tile's luster. For intricate mosaic work common in Palm Beach estates, we employ detail tools normally used for boat hulls. Annual cleaning prevents permanent etching from mineral deposits.
services.shortDescription: Restore brilliance to luxury pool tile without damage.
process: Step 1: Test tile for existing etching or glaze damage
Step 2: Apply descaling solution with precision applicators
Step 3: Gently agitate with oscillating nylon brushes
Step 4: Seal grout lines with penetrating sealer
benefits: Removes mineral deposits without scratching
Preserves investment in high-end tile work
Prevents permanent etching damage
Enhances water reflection for nighttime ambiance

faq.question: How often should glass tile be cleaned?
faq.answer: Every 6 months for saltwater pools, annually for freshwater systems. Waterfront homes may need quarterly attention.

faq.question: Can you match discontinued tile colors?
faq.answer: Our supplier network specializes in finding matches for imported glass tile common in South Florida luxury pools.

services.name: Pool Deck Resurfacing
services.shortDescription: Cooler, safer surfaces for Miami's scorching pool decks.
services.description:
Traditional concrete decking in Fort Lauderdale can reach 140°F in summer - we install heat-reflective coatings that stay walkable even in August. Our textured finishes provide slip resistance without the abrasiveness of exposed aggregate.

For historic districts like Las Olas Isles, we replicate original scored patterns while upgrading to modern materials. Modern developments in Weston benefit from our seamless spray coatings that eliminate tripping hazards from uneven pavers. All our resurfacing includes proper slope verification to prevent standing water - crucial in our rainy season.
process: Step 1: Pressure wash to remove all previous coatings
Step 2: Repair cracks with flexible polymer concrete
Step 3: Apply primer and heat-reflective base coat
Step 4: Broadcast non-slip aggregate while wet
benefits: Surface temperatures up to 35°F cooler than bare concrete
Eliminates standing water breeding mosquitoes
Maintains historic character where required
5-year warranty against peeling or fading

faq.question: How long must the deck stay dry after resurfacing?
faq.answer: 48 hours minimum - we schedule these projects during our driest months (December-April) whenever possible.

faq.question: Can you match my existing pavers?
faq.answer: Yes, we maintain samples from all major South Florida paver manufacturers going back to 1990s developments.

services.name: Smart Pool Upgrades
services.shortDescription: Modern automation for South Florida pools.
services.description:
Transform your 1980s pool into a smartphone-controlled oasis. We retrofit existing equipment with energy-efficient variable speed pumps and saltwater-compatible automation systems.

Particularly useful for snowbirds maintaining second homes - our remote monitoring alerts you to issues before they become expensive repairs. Fort Lauderdale's older pool systems often lack proper timers; we install sunrise/sunset programming to match our consistent daylight hours. All upgrades include surge protection crucial for Florida's lightning storms.
process: Step 1: Assess existing equipment compatibility
Step 2: Install variable speed pump with magnetic drive
Step 3: Connect automation hub with weather tracking
Step 4: Train homeowners on app controls and alerts
benefits: Cuts pump energy use by up to 80%
Allows remote monitoring from northern states
Automatically adjusts for rainstorms
Extends equipment life with soft starts

faq.question: Will this work with my old pool wiring?
faq.answer: We typically need to upgrade subpanels for homes built before 1990, but can often reuse conduit runs.

faq.question: Do you offer hurricane mode settings?
faq.answer: Yes, our systems can automatically lower water levels when tropical storm warnings are issued.

reviews.name: Marcella R.
reviews.text: After Irma destroyed our neighbor's pool equipment, we hired Apex to secure ours. Their aircraft cable system held through Category 3 winds last season. Worth every penny for peace of mind.

reviews.name: Theo B.
reviews.text: Our Bal Harbour condo's salt system kept failing under other companies. Apex diagnosed the issue - salt creep from ocean spray was shorting the control board. Their marine-grade enclosure solution has worked flawlessly for 18 months.

reviews.name: Gabriela C.
reviews.text: The team restored our 1926 Coral Gables pool's original Venetian glass mosaic to museum quality. They even sourced matching tiles for three damaged pieces we thought were irreplaceable.

reviews.name: Raj P.
reviews.text: Now I can check my Weston pool chemistry from Boston and get alerts if the pH drifts. The variable speed pump cut our electric bill by $120/month - it paid for itself in one season.

reviews.name: Sophia K.
reviews.text: Found a crack under our diving board that three other companies missed. Apex's underwater patching held through last summer's heavy rains without a drop in water level.

reviews.name: Carlos M.
reviews.text: Our Brickell rooftop pool deck used to burn feet by 10am. The new cool-surface coating stays comfortable all day and looks just like the original terrazzo.

service-areas.title: Pool Service Areas | Miami to West Palm Beach
service-areas.description: Serving all South Florida communities from Miami Beach to Boca Raton with specialized pool care.

serviceAreas.content: Apex Pool Service is proud to serve the vibrant community of Fort Lauderdale, where waterfront living is a way of life. With a population of around 183,000, this city is known for its 1960s-70s waterfront homes, many of which feature stunning pools that require year-round maintenance. Our team specializes in keeping these pools pristine, even in the challenging heat and humidity that defines Fort Lauderdale's climate. Whether it's routine cleaning, chemical balancing, or equipment repairs, we ensure your pool remains a refreshing oasis. Fort Lauderdale's unique architectural charm and coastal lifestyle make pool ownership a central feature of home life here. We understand the specific needs of waterfront properties, including saltwater pool maintenance and hurricane preparedness, to keep your pool in top condition no matter the season.
serviceAreas.localContext: Fort Lauderdale is renowned for its 1960s-70s waterfront homes and a climate that demands year-round pool maintenance.

serviceAreas.content: Coral Springs, a meticulously planned community with a population of approximately 134,000, is a prime location for Apex Pool Service. The city's 1980s-90s homes often feature beautifully designed pools that are central to family life and outdoor entertaining. Our services cater to the needs of these well-maintained neighborhoods, offering everything from weekly cleanings to seasonal openings and closings. The year-round heat and humidity in Coral Springs mean pools are in constant use, requiring reliable and consistent care. We take pride in helping homeowners preserve their pools' longevity and aesthetic appeal, ensuring they remain a highlight of their properties. Coral Springs' family-friendly atmosphere and community-oriented lifestyle make pool ownership a cherished part of daily life here.
